desc: Gets the icon material for a texturepack

warn: This function is slow, you shouldn't call it too often.

desc: Gets the voxel ID and voxel state at a certain position given a universe.

returns.name: voxelID
returns.desc: The voxel ID at that pos, nil if the universe doesn't exist

returns.name: voxelState
returns.desc: The voxel state at that pos

examples.title: Gets the block at 0, 0, 0 from the main universe.
examples.content:
local univ = ZVox.AddonAPI.GetUniverseByName("main")
local voxID, voxState = ZVox.AddonAPI.GetBlockAtPos(univ, 0, 0, 0)

examples.title: Checks for a block being air.
examples.content:
local univ = ZVox.AddonAPI.GetUniverseByName("main")
local cX, cY, cZ = 1, 1, 1
local voxID, voxState = ZVox.AddonAPI.GetBlockAtPos(univ, cX, cY, cZ)
local airID = ZVox.AddonAPI.GetVoxelID("zvox:air")
if voxID == airID then
	print("The voxel at " .. cX .. ", " .. cY .. ", " .. cZ .. " is air!")
end

desc: Performs a raycast on a given universe.

params.name: dir
params.desc: Direction to raycast in, must be normalized

params.name: steps
params.desc: How many steps shall we take at most

params.name: killOOB
params.desc: Whether to kill raycasts that are out of bounds or not

params.name: groupMask
params.desc: Mask of what we can hit

returns.name: ret
returns.desc: Raycast result, nil if missing any of the arguments
